title: Broaden injection attack surface tests
description: Expand injection detection tests to cover: LLM prompt injection variants, SQL injection in API params, XSS in UI inputs, command injection in skill execution. Minimum 15 new test cases covering OWASP Top 10 injection patterns.

title: Expand replay protection tests
description: Add replay protection tests for: distributed replay detection, Redis backend (optional), clock skew tolerance, nonce expiration, cross-session replay. Minimum 8 new test cases.

title: Add config validation tests
description: Add tests for: invalid config rejection, default value fallback, environment variable override, config file parsing errors, security-sensitive defaults. Minimum 10 new test cases.

title: Integrate linting/formatting CI gates
description: Ensure CI runs: cargo clippy (deny warnings), cargo fmt --check, TypeScript strict mode checks, Python ruff/mypy. Block merge on lint failures.

title: Ensure full CI green across all crates
description: Fix all existing lint warnings, ensure cargo test passes across all crates, fix TypeScript type errors, verify Python tests pass. Target: 0 warnings, 0 errors.

title: Create Phase 3 runbook
description: Create runbook for security incident response: injection detected, replay attack, config compromise, CI failure. Include debug commands and escalation paths.

title: Update parity scorecard for Security axis
description: Fill in parity scorecard for Security & Governance axis: feature coverage, quality, observability, evidence. Mark status as completed.

title: Phase 3 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 3.1-3.5. Document results in phase3_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 4.
